class.name: PhysicsRayQueryResult3D
class.brief_description: Holds the result of a 3D ray-casting query from [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.intersect_ray_into].
class.description: Holds the result of a 3D ray-casting query performed with [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.intersect_ray_into]. Unlike [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.intersect_ray], which allocates and returns a new [Dictionary] on every call, this object can be created once and reused across many [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.intersect_ray_into] calls, avoiding per-call allocations. This is useful for gameplay code that performs a large number of raycasts every frame, such as hitscan weapons, line-of-sight checks, or foot IK. Use [method has_hit] to check whether the last query produced a hit. If the last query did not hit anything, all fields are reset to their default values.

method.name: get_collider
method.description: Returns the colliding object, if the ray hit something. Returns [code]null[/code] otherwise.

method.name: get_collider_id
method.description: Returns the unique instance ID of the colliding object, if the ray hit something. Returns [code]0[/code] otherwise. See [method Object.get_instance_id].

method.name: get_face_index
method.description: Returns the face index at the intersection point, if the ray hit something. [b]Note:[/b] Returns a valid number only if the intersected shape is a [ConcavePolygonShape3D]. Otherwise, [code]-1[/code] is returned.

method.name: get_normal
method.description: Returns the object's surface normal at the intersection point, if the ray hit something. Returns [constant Vector3.ZERO] otherwise, or if the ray starts inside the shape and [member PhysicsRayQueryParameters3D.hit_from_inside] is [code]true[/code].

method.name: get_position
method.description: Returns the intersection point, if the ray hit something. Returns [constant Vector3.ZERO] otherwise.

method.name: get_rid
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the intersecting object, if the ray hit something.

method.name: get_shape
method.description: Returns the shape index of the colliding shape, if the ray hit something.

method.name: has_hit
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the last [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.intersect_ray_into] call resulted in a hit, and the rest of this object's fields hold valid hit data. Returns [code]false[/code] if the last query missed, in which case all fields are reset to their default values.
